guardEvidence.howCaught: One new self-triggered notifier: the reconciliation sweep's drift alert — no feedback loop in the sweep itself (output never changes input); the drift emission rides the Increment-C dispatcher latch (24h re-arm per (keyRef, door, driftBucket)), modeled as spend-recon-sweep (eternal sentinel, 24h rate floor), settling 50/50 under the pinned fixture.
